query:
I'm a little confused... did you run the @docs/testing/eval-harness.md ? This was what was recommended to do after the completion of the development work and before merge:  # 1. Write profile TOMLs (see ARCHITECTURE.md §EvalServiceLayer Integration)                                                                                                         
  # 2. Run eval                                                                                                                                                                        
  unimatrix eval run \                                                                                                                                                                 
    --db /tmp/eval/pre-crt024-snap.db \                                                                                                                                                
    --scenarios /tmp/eval/pre-crt024-scenarios.jsonl \                                                                                                                                 
    --configs /tmp/eval/old-behavior.toml,/tmp/eval/crt024-weights.toml \                                                                                                              
    --out /tmp/eval/results/ --k 5
  # 3. Generate report and review before marking PR ready                                                                                                                              
  unimatrix eval report --results /tmp/eval/results/ --out /tmp/eval/crt024-report.md

entries.title: Eval Harness Baseline Recording Procedure (New Metrics)
Eval harness: profile TOML → snapshot → scenario replay → A/B report pattern
Eval Harness: Side-Car Metadata File Pattern for Per-Profile Run-Time Flags
ADR-002 nan-010: Sidecar File for Profile Metadata — Zero Changes to ScenarioResult
Offline A/B eval procedure: snapshot → scenarios → run → report
